tagline: Personalized Web3 research digest based on your on-chain behavior
description:
Web3 Daily provides AI-powered crypto research digests tailored to your investment profile.

## Features
- **Public Digest**: Macro news, KOL sentiment analysis, market overview (no wallet required)
- **Personalized Digest**: Custom recommendations based on your portfolio
- **User Profile**: Deep analysis of your on-chain behavior and investment style
- **Telegram Delivery**: Optional scheduled push notifications

## Privacy & Data Usage
- **Public Mode**: No personal data required or collected
- **Personalized Mode**: Wallet address is sent to our backend API (j4y-production.up.railway.app) to analyze on-chain data via DeBank API
- **Local Storage**: Optional config files (~/.j4y/) only created if you enable Telegram delivery
- **No Tracking**: We don't store wallet addresses permanently, only 24-hour cache for performance

## Permissions Explained
- `network`: Required to call the digest API
- `filesystem`: Only used if you enable Telegram scheduled delivery (stores config in ~/.j4y/)
- `cron`: Only used if you enable daily scheduled delivery

No API keys required for basic usage - all infrastructure is managed server-side.
